title: 24:17 芒聙聰 May 3, 2024
body_text:
24:17 芒聙聰 May 3, 2024
Update to AFT Clearing and Returning Clearing File Specifications
Select data elements were clarified to address the discrepancies occuring when CAD and USD AFT clearing and returning clearing files were submitted. The following updates were made to the below documents:
Document Library
Status
AFT Clearing File Specifications 芒聙聯 CAD (BC and Atlantic Region)
6269
The CAD AFT Clearing File Format section was updated:
芒聙聹A芒聙聺 Record
The 芒聙聹A芒聙聺 record has a max creation number size of 4 numeric values.
Information related to the Credit Union data element has been specified (max amount of digits required based on province of Credit Union and/or client type).
芒聙聹C芒聙聺, 芒聙聹D芒聙聺, 芒聙聹E芒聙聺, 芒聙聹F芒聙聺 Records
The Account data element must be numeric, and leading zeros may be removed or padded to 9 or 12 digits.
The Institution Account No. for Returns data element can be submitted in Alphanumeric format. Leading zeros no longer need to be removed or padded to 9 or 12 digits.
芒聙聹I芒聙聺 and 芒聙聹J芒聙聺 Records
The Account data element must be numeric, and leading zeros may be removed or padded to 9 or 12 digits.
The Original Account No. data element must be submitted in alphanumeric format and leading zeros no longer need to be removed or padded to 9 or 12 digits.
The CAD AFT Clearing File Example section was updated with new examples.
Revised
AFT Clearing File Specifications 芒聙聯 USD (BC and Atlantic Region)
6270
The USD AFT Clearing File Format section was updated:
芒聙聹A芒聙聺 Record
The 芒聙聹A芒聙聺 record has a max creation number size of 4 numeric values.
Information related to the Credit Union data element has been specified (max amount of digits required based on province of Credit Union and/or client type).
芒聙聹C芒聙聺, 芒聙聹D芒聙聺, 芒聙聹E芒聙聺, and 芒聙聹F芒聙聺 Records
The Account data element must be numeric, and leading zeros may be removed or padded to 9 or 12 digits.
The Institution Account No. for Returns data element can be submitted in Alphanumeric format. Leading zeros no longer need to be removed or padded to 9 or 12 digits.
芒聙聹I芒聙聺 and 芒聙聹J芒聙聺 Records
The Account data element must be numeric and leading zeros may be removed or padded to 9 or 12 digits.
The Original Account No. data element must be submitted in alphanumeric format. Leading zeros no longer need to be removed or padded to 9 or 12 digits.
The USD AFT Clearing File Example section was updated with new examples.
Revised
AFT Clearing File Specifications 芒聙聯 CAD (All Regions Except BC and Atlantic)
9083
The Format of Data Elements section was updated:
芒聙聹C芒聙聺, 芒聙聹D芒聙聺, 芒聙聹E芒聙聺, and 芒聙聹F芒聙聺 Records
The Amount data element must be submitted right-justified with leading zeros.
The Payee Account Number must be submitted in numeric format only.
The Account Number for Returns must be submitted in numeric format only.
Revised
AFT Clearing File Specifications 芒聙聯 USD (All Regions Except BC and Atlantic)
9084
The Format of Data Elements section was updated:
芒聙聹C芒聙聺, 芒聙聹D芒聙聺, 芒聙聹E芒聙聺, and 芒聙聹F芒聙聺 Records
The Amount data element must be submitted right-justified with leading zeros.
The Payee Account Number must be submitted in numeric format only.
The Account Number for Returns must be submitted in numeric format only.
Revised
AFT Return Clearing File Specifications 芒聙聯 CAD (All Regions Except BC and Atlantic)
9085
The Format of Data Elements section was updated:
芒聙聹I芒聙聺 and 芒聙聹J芒聙聺 Records
The Amount data element must be submitted right justified with leading zeros.
The Payee Account Number must be submitted in numeric format only.
The Account Number for Returns must be submitted in numeric format only.
Revised
AFT Return Clearing File Specifications 芒聙聯 USD (All Regions Except BC and Atlantic)
9086
The Format of Data Elements section was updated:
芒聙聹I芒聙聺 and 芒聙聹J芒聙聺 Records
The Amount data element must be submitted right-justified with leading zeros.
The Payee Account Number must be submitted in numeric format only.
The Account Number for Returns must be submitted in numeric format only.
Revised
